sql.if: AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD_FILE z WHERE z.board_idx = A.board_idx AND z.file_ext_name = '.hwp' ) > 0
AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD_FILE z WHERE z.board_idx = A.board_idx AND z.file_ext_name IN ('.xlsx', '.xls') ) > 0

mapper.select:
SELECT H.context_path as imsi_v_2, H.homepage_name as imsi_v_1, A.* FROM ( ${pagingTop} SELECT A.manage_idx, A.board_idx, A.group_idx, A.parent_idx, A.group_depth, A.view_count, A.notice_yn, A.title, A.add_id, A.user_name, A.user_ip, A.delete_yn, A.add_date, A.modify_date, A.file_count, A.preview_img, A.secret_yn, A.content_summary, A.category1, A.category2, B.homepage_id, B.board_name, B.board_type FROM CMS_BOARD A, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE B WHERE A.delete_yn = 'Y' AND A.manage_idx = B.manage_idx
ORDER BY A.add_date DESC ${pagingBottom} ) A, CMS_HOMEPAGE H WHERE A.homepage_id = H.homepage_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_BOARD A, CMS_BOARD_MANAGE B WHERE A.delete_yn = 'Y' AND A.manage_idx = B.manage_idx
SELECT board_idx, file_idx, real_file_name, file_name, file_ext_name, file_size FROM CMS_BOARD_FILE WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx} ORDER BY add_date ASC
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM CMS_BOARD WHERE board_idx IN
${i}

DELETE FROM CMS_BOARD_FILE WHERE board_idx IN
${i}
